summary.zh: 计算机控制的主动悬挂与牵引力控制等电子辅助系统在 1990 年代初成为决定赛车表现的核心技术，威廉姆斯 FW14B/FW15C 是这一技术路线的巅峰之作。
summary.en: Computer-controlled active suspension and electronic driver aids like traction control became the defining performance technology of the early 1990s, reaching their peak in the Williams FW14B/FW15C.
